## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Skill / tooling update

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes when behavior changed
- [ ] Tested manually with `itt <relevant commands>` when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or UX changed

Link to issue, intent ID, or decision ID if applicable.
